channel.title: ACIM Daily Lessons
channel.copyright: Public domain text; audio CC BY-SA 4.0
channel.itunes:author: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: The 365 Workbook Lessons from A Course in Miracles, one per weekday. Follow the Course's own practice sequence at your own pace.

item.title: Lesson 98: I will accept my part in God's plan for salvation.
item.description: Today we will attempt to go past the ego's narrow, self-defeating vision, to its plan for "salvation." You are asked to accept your part in God's plan for salvation. What is this plan? It is a very simple one, and its simplicity is what makes it so dependable.
item.content:encoded:
Lesson 98

"I will accept my part in God's plan for salvation."

Today we will attempt to go past the ego's narrow, self-defeating vision, to its plan for "salvation." You are asked to accept your part in God's plan for salvation. What is this plan? It is a very simple one, and its simplicity is what makes it so dependable. You are asked only to accept the Atonement for yourself.
